L6 Lucas Ring chapter establishes Z[phi] = O_K of Q(sqrt 5) as Dedekind domain with class number 1, discriminant 5, fundamental unit phi. The 5-clause structure theorem (Dedekind + PID + Disc=5 + fund unit phi + Tr/N identities) is proved via Minkowski bound sqrt(5)/2 < 2, trace-form determinant, and Dirichlet unit theorem. The period-3 Lucas trace in GF(2) is the characteristic-2 shadow of L_2=3; reduction mod 2 commutes with the Galois trace and gives the Golden Seal. d_model>=256 is the smallest dimension admitting the period-15 Frobenius orbit.
